records.ety: [LL. templatus vaulted, from L. templum a small timber.]

defs: A gauge, pattern, or mold, commonly a thin plate or board, used as a guide to the form of the work to be executed; as, a mason's or a wheelwright's templet.
A short piece of timber, iron, or stone, placed in a wall under a girder or other beam, to distribute the weight or pressure.
